headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Opens Private Markets Wider As Redemptions Test North Haven Fund
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is expanding access to its private markets investment strategies by lowering investment minimums and removing accreditation requirements for certain clients. The firm is making these changes within its wealth management business, aiming to open private market exposure to a broader range of investors. At the same time, the North Haven Private Income Fund, which is affiliated with Morgan Stanley, is facing unusually high redemption requests. In response to these...

headline: Figma Inc. (FIG) is One of the AI Names Under $30, Carrying High Short Interest
summary: Figma Inc. (NYSE:FIG) is one of the 10 worst artificial intelligence stocks under $30 according to short sellers. Back on May 15, Morgan Stanley reduced the target price on Figma Inc. (NYSE:FIG) from $44 to $38 while retaining an Equal Weight rating on the stock. The firm informed investors that paid customer conversion, seat expansion, […]

headline: Does Dividend Hike And US$20 Billion Buyback Change The Bull Case For Morgan Stanley (MS)?
summary: Morgan Stanley recently announced that it will raise its quarterly common stock dividend to US$1.15 per share from US$1.00 and reauthorize a multi-year share repurchase program of up to US$20.00 billion, alongside issuing new fixed-rate notes maturing in 2027 and 2033. These moves underline management’s emphasis on returning capital to shareholders while continuing to access bond markets for funding, offering fresh insight into how the firm balances shareholder payouts with ongoing financing...
